name: proofyard
description: Evidence-first browser automation with recovery and MCP for AI agents and human operators

scripts.public:readiness:check: pnpm repo:sensitive:check && pnpm repo:sensitive:history:check && pnpm repo:pii:check && pnpm public:collaboration:check && pnpm public:redaction:check && pnpm public:history:check && pnpm public:artifacts:check && pnpm release:supply-chain:check && pnpm stale:truth:surfaces:check
scripts.governance:check: node scripts/ci/check-root-governance.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-root-semantic-cleanliness.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-source-tree-runtime-residue.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-runtime-governance.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-runtime-live-inventory.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-runtime-size-budgets.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-log-governance.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-module-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-run-tool-boundary.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-public-surface-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-dependency-governance.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-upstream-governance.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-path-drift-governance.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-repo-identity-drift.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-relocation-readiness.mjs && node scripts/ci/check-single-track-governance.mjs && node scripts/ci/render-docs-governance.mjs --check
scripts.test:backend:embedding-cache: PROJECT_PYTHON_ENV=.runtime-cache/toolchains/python/.venv UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=.runtime-cache/toolchains/python/.venv uv run --extra dev pytest --no-cov apps/api/tests/test_embeddings_api.py apps/api/tests/test_embedding_service.py apps/api/tests/test_video_reconstruction_context_cache.py apps/api/tests/test_log_cache_governance.py -q
scripts.mcp:test: node --import tsx --test apps/mcp-server/tests/mcp-success.test.ts apps/mcp-server/tests/mcp-failure.test.ts apps/mcp-server/tests/mcp-auth.test.ts apps/mcp-server/tests/mcp-advanced-visibility.test.ts apps/mcp-server/tests/mcp-timeout-semantic.test.ts apps/mcp-server/tests/mcp-doc-tool-contract.test.ts apps/mcp-server/tests/mcp-description-contract.test.ts apps/mcp-server/tests/core.tool-metadata.test.ts apps/mcp-server/tests/mcp-smoke.test.ts
scripts.evidence:registry:check: PROJECT_PYTHON_ENV=.runtime-cache/toolchains/python/.venv UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=.runtime-cache/toolchains/python/.venv uv run --extra dev pytest --no-cov apps/api/tests/test_evidence_runs_api.py -q && pnpm test:packages:evidence-runs && node --import tsx --test apps/mcp-server/tests/mcp-evidence-registry.test.ts
scripts.web:build: pnpm --dir apps/web exec vite build --config vite.config.ts
scripts.web:preview: pnpm --dir apps/web exec vite preview --config vite.config.ts --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --dir apps/web exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:frontend:useApiClient: pnpm --dir apps/web exec vitest run src/hooks/useApiClient.test.tsx
scripts.test:backend:command-tower-client-defaul: PROJECT_PYTHON_ENV=.runtime-cache/toolchains/python/.venv UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=.runtime-cache/toolchains/python/.venv uv run --extra dev pytest --no-cov apps/api/tests/test_health.py apps/api/tests/test_automation_api.py apps/api/tests/test_universal_platform_templates.py apps/api/tests/test_universal_platform_runs.py apps/api/tests/test_universal_platform_security.py -k "command_tower or client_id or defaults or validated_params" -q
scripts.test:automation:regression: pnpm --dir apps/automation-runner test -- tests/record-session-secure-defaults.spec.ts tests/replay-flow-hardening.spec.ts tests/register-from-spec.spec.ts tests/reconstruction-pipeline.spec.ts
scripts.test:ct: pnpm --dir apps/web exec playwright test -c tests/ct/playwright-ct.config.ts
scripts.test:integration: UIQ_SUITE_WEB_E2E=0 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_E2E=0 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_UNIT=0 UIQ_SUITE_BACKEND=0 UIQ_SUITE_AUTOMATION_CHECK=0 UIQ_SUITE_ORCHESTRATOR_MCP=0 UIQ_SUITE_INTEGRATION=1 UIQ_INTEGRATION_PROFILE=${UIQ_INTEGRATION_PROFILE:-smoke} bash scripts/test-matrix.sh
scripts.test:integration:full: UIQ_SUITE_WEB_E2E=0 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_E2E=0 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_UNIT=0 UIQ_SUITE_BACKEND=0 UIQ_SUITE_AUTOMATION_CHECK=0 UIQ_SUITE_ORCHESTRATOR_MCP=0 UIQ_SUITE_INTEGRATION=1 UIQ_INTEGRATION_PROFILE=full bash scripts/test-matrix.sh
scripts.test:matrix: UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_EXPECT_FULL_CONTRACT=1 UIQ_SUITE_WEB_E2E=1 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_E2E=1 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_UNIT=1 UIQ_SUITE_BACKEND=1 UIQ_SUITE_AUTOMATION_CHECK=1 UIQ_SUITE_ORCHESTRATOR_MCP=1 UIQ_SUITE_INTEGRATION=1 UIQ_INTEGRATION_PROFILE=full UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_RUN_TEST_TRUTH_GATE=1 UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_RUN_E2E_AUTHENTICITY_GATE=1 bash scripts/test-matrix.sh
scripts.test:matrix:fast: UIQ_SUITE_WEB_E2E=1 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_E2E=1 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_UNIT=1 UIQ_SUITE_BACKEND=1 UIQ_SUITE_AUTOMATION_CHECK=0 UIQ_SUITE_ORCHESTRATOR_MCP=1 UIQ_SUITE_INTEGRATION=0 UIQ_INTEGRATION_PROFILE=smoke UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_EXPECT_FULL_CONTRACT=0 UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_RUN_TEST_TRUTH_GATE=1 UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_RUN_E2E_AUTHENTICITY_GATE=1 bash scripts/test-matrix.sh
scripts.test:matrix:serial: UIQ_TEST_MODE=serial UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_EXPECT_FULL_CONTRACT=1 UIQ_SUITE_WEB_E2E=1 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_E2E=1 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_UNIT=1 UIQ_SUITE_BACKEND=1 UIQ_SUITE_AUTOMATION_CHECK=1 UIQ_SUITE_ORCHESTRATOR_MCP=1 UIQ_SUITE_INTEGRATION=1 UIQ_INTEGRATION_PROFILE=full UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_RUN_TEST_TRUTH_GATE=1 UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_RUN_E2E_AUTHENTICITY_GATE=1 bash scripts/test-matrix.sh
scripts.test:matrix:backend: UIQ_SUITE_WEB_E2E=0 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_E2E=0 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_UNIT=0 UIQ_SUITE_BACKEND=1 bash scripts/test-matrix.sh
scripts.test:matrix:automation-check: UIQ_SUITE_WEB_E2E=0 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_E2E=0 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_UNIT=0 UIQ_SUITE_AUTOMATION_CHECK=1 bash scripts/test-matrix.sh
scripts.test:matrix:full: UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_EXPECT_FULL_CONTRACT=1 UIQ_SUITE_WEB_E2E=1 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_E2E=1 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_UNIT=1 UIQ_SUITE_BACKEND=1 UIQ_SUITE_AUTOMATION_CHECK=1 UIQ_SUITE_ORCHESTRATOR_MCP=1 UIQ_SUITE_INTEGRATION=1 UIQ_INTEGRATION_PROFILE=full UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_RUN_TEST_TRUTH_GATE=1 UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_RUN_E2E_AUTHENTICITY_GATE=1 bash scripts/test-matrix.sh
scripts.test:matrix:full:serial: UIQ_TEST_MODE=serial UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_EXPECT_FULL_CONTRACT=1 UIQ_SUITE_WEB_E2E=1 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_E2E=1 UIQ_SUITE_FRONTEND_UNIT=1 UIQ_SUITE_BACKEND=1 UIQ_SUITE_AUTOMATION_CHECK=1 UIQ_SUITE_ORCHESTRATOR_MCP=1 UIQ_SUITE_INTEGRATION=1 UIQ_INTEGRATION_PROFILE=full UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_RUN_TEST_TRUTH_GATE=1 UIQ_TEST_MATRIX_RUN_E2E_AUTHENTICITY_GATE=1 bash scripts/test-matrix.sh
scripts.mutation:py: rm -rf .mutmut-cache mutants && PROJECT_PYTHON_ENV=.runtime-cache/toolchains/python/.venv UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=.runtime-cache/toolchains/python/.venv uv run --extra dev mutmut run || true
scripts.mutation:py:strict: rm -rf .mutmut-cache mutants && PROJECT_PYTHON_ENV=.runtime-cache/toolchains/python/.venv UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=.runtime-cache/toolchains/python/.venv uv run --extra dev mutmut run
